details.test: Task 1 - Buy two bass spinning rods under $120 (medium & medium-heavy)
Task 2 - Create saltwater starter kit under $250 (rod, reel, 3 lure types)
Task 3 - Braided line 300-yd under $40 with highest lb test (qty 2)
Task 4 - Winter trout blog: first lure (qty 4) + trout line under $25 (4.0+ rating)
Task 5 - Tackle box 3+ trays, rating 4.5+, price $30–$80
Task 6 - 5 different clearance freshwater crankbaits under $8 (20%+ off)
Task 7 - Waders size via size guide (34" waist, 31" inseam) under $180
Task 8 - Spring bass blog: add 2nd and 4th lures to wishlist
Task 9 - Mixed order (reel > $100 + lure < $10), apply TACKLE10 and start checkout
